result: Design scored against requirements; every requirement maps to a design element.

evidence_table.claim: Each requirement maps to >=1 design element
evidence_table.evidence: traceability table in the debrief result

socratic.premise: The scored design is traceable to every stated requirement.
socratic.counter: Sought a requirement with no mapped design element; none found - the premise HOLDS.
socratic.pivot: If any requirement lacked a mapped element, the traceability claim would flip.
